usage_notes: Use wallpaper-high-tech.jpg as the default desktop background for its non-distracting pattern
logo-qvault-primary.jpg is the primary brand mark for boot and login surfaces
All SVG icons are downloaded in white theme to pop against dark mode surfaces
Use 'react-icons/si' names for inline UI elements and downloaded SVGs for system-level desktop icons
